user.title: Tuya Smart Life Local
user.description: Login with your Smart Life or Tuya Smart email/phone account, then select the homes to sync.

select_homes.title: Select homes
select_homes.description: Choose the Tuya homes to sync into Home Assistant. Leave empty to sync no devices.

error.cannot_connect: Could not login or fetch homes from Tuya.
error.invalid_auth: Email/phone number or password is incorrect.
error.invalid_client: The bundled Tuya mobile client profile was rejected by Tuya.
